---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the situation that motivates the request. What are you trying to accomplish that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like Druids to do? Be as concrete as you can — agent type, MCP tool, API endpoint, UI element, etc.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about, and why does this one seem best?

## Scope

Which part of the system would change?

- [ ] Agent types or coordination
- [ ] MCP server / tools
- [ ] REST API
- [ ] Frontend UI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Architectural considerations

If your idea touches coordination, sessions, or the MCP server, please note how it would interact with the constraints in `CONCURRENT_SESSION_CONSTITUTION.md` and `docs/MCP_COMPLIANCE_CONSTITUTION.md`.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art in other systems, etc.
